questions.question:
$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 0 \quad and \quad x2 = 1 $$
$$ x3 = \frac{x1 + x2}{2} $$
$$\text{equation } = exp(x) × cos(x) -1.4 $$
$$\text{What is function value of 8th iteration using bisection method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 0 \quad and \quad x2 = 1 $$
$$ x3 = \frac{x1 + x2}{2} $$
$$\text{equation } = exp(x) × cos(x) -1.4 $$
$$\text{What is root value of 8th iteration using bisection method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 0 \quad and \quad x2 = 1 $$
$$ x3 = x1 - f(x1) × \left(\frac{(x2 - x1)}{(f(x2) - f(x1))}\right) $$
$$\text{equation } = cos(x)-x × exp(x) $$
$$\text{What is function value of 6th iteration using false position method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 0 \quad and \quad x2 = 1 $$
$$ x3 = x1 - f(x1) × \left(\frac{(x2 - x1)}{(f(x2) - f(x1))}\right) $$
$$\text{equation } = cos(x)-x × exp(x) $$
$$\text{What is root value of 6th iteration using false position method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 1 $$
$$ x2 = x1 - \frac{f(x1)}{df(x1)} $$
$$\text{equation } = x^2-cos(x) $$
$$ df(x) = 2x + sin(x) $$
$$\text{What is function value of 3rd iteration using Newton Raphson method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 1 $$
$$ x2 = x1 - \frac{f(x1)}{df(x1)} $$
$$\text{equation } = x^2-cos(x) $$
$$ df(x) = 2x + sin(x) $$
$$\text{What is root value of 3rd iteration using Newton Raphson method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 1 $$
$$ x2 = g(x1) $$
$$\text{equation } = cos(x) - x × exp(x) $$
$$ g(x) = \frac{cos(x)}{exp(x)} $$
$$\text{What is function value of 6th iteration using one point iterative method?}$$

$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 1 $$
$$ x2 = g(x1) $$
$$\text{equation } = cos(x) - x × exp(x) $$
$$ g(x) = \frac{cos(x)}{exp(x)} $$
$$\text{What is root value of 6th iteration using one point iterative method?}$$
